Hello Texas Records
Discography
About

Vanta plays hard rock the way it used to hit — loud guitars, no irony, and songs that don't ask permission. Drawing from the heavy end of the late-80s and early-90s without living there, Vanta sounds like something that came up through the floor while you weren't paying attention.

Latest Release
New Single
DIRTY SIGNAL
Vanta

Static and heat. The newest track from Vanta — raw signal, no clean edges, exactly the way it should be.

Album · Hard Rock · Heavy
SIGNAL
Vanta

The debut. Three songs with no warm-up, no apology, and no fade-out. Loud from the first note. Still loud at the end.
